reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros es excelente, los baños siempre impecable, peeeroooo... La atención en full bastante mala.... Te dejan esperando mientras charlan las señoritas y después de 5 a 10 minutos te atienden. Te dan el café para llevar sin la protección y te quemas hasta el alma.... Las veces que he pasado a comprar si no es una cosa es otra malísimo😥..... Espero que mejoren👍

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are excellent, the restrooms are always spotless, buuuut... the service at the beach bar is pretty bad.... They leave you waiting while the ladies chat and then after 5 to 10 minutes they finally attend to you. They give you the coffee to go without sunscreen and you get sunburned all over.... Every time I've gone to buy something, it's one thing or another, terrible 😥..... I hope they improve 👍
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtaDlmRkdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es la que hay. Hay mucha cola.tene paciencia porque van rápido y son piolas los plateros.ellos están trabajando y seguramente vos venís de vacaciones. A disfrutar!!!

(Translated by Google)
It's what it is. There's a long line. Be patient because they move quickly and the silversmiths are clever. They're working, and you're probably here on vacation. Enjoy!

reviews.comment:
Pasamos a cargar y usar los sanitarios  realmente estaban muy sucios y tapados los migitorios una mugre, para cargar se tardaban mucho habiendo dos surtidores libres, pongan más personas en la temporada para brindar un buen servicio....

(Translated by Google)
We went to fill up and use the restrooms, which were really dirty and the urinals were clogged—filthy. It took a long time to fill up even though there were two pumps available. They should hire more staff during peak season to provide good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtZy1YTER3EAE

reviews.comment:
Un verdadero desastre. Venís cansado de manejar en el ripio y se toman su tiempo para atenderte. Más de media hora esperando y una cuadra de cola, solo porque no atienden. Se aprovechan de que son la única opción en cientos de kms.

(Translated by Google)
A complete disaster. You arrive exhausted from driving on gravel roads and they take forever to serve you. More than half an hour waiting and a line stretching a block, just because they're not helping. They take advantage of the fact that they're the only option for hundreds of kilometers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtellEd3NnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una parada obligada ya que si estás de viaje no hay otra estación de servicio en kms. Por eso se forma una larga cola y espera. El shop me pareció un poco caro y la mujer que atiende no muy simpática pero estaba de paso y se agradece poder comprar algo para el camino e ir al baño

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-stop, since there's no other gas station for miles if you're traveling. That's why there's a long line and wait. The convenience store seemed a bit pricey, and the woman working there wasn't very friendly, but I was just passing through, and it was nice to be able to buy something for the road and use the restroom.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURteWN5SlNBEAE
